issues.sample: WHEN THE VARIABLE CYLINDER MANAGEMENT KICKS IN AT 2000 RPM THE ENGINE VIBRATES.  IT DOES THIS CONSTANTLY WHEN THE ECO GREEN LIGHT COMES ON.  VERY DISTRACTING AND ANNOYING.  ALSO IS A PROBLEM IN MY SISTERS 2013 PILOTS.  DEALER KNEW IT WAS A PROBLEM BUT WOULD NOT DISCLOSE UNTIL AFT

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 HONDA PILOT. WHILE DRIVING AT AN UNKNOWN SPEED, THE TIRES, SEATS, AND REAR OF THE VEHICLE VIBRATED. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER. THE TECHNICIAN REPLACED THE TIRES AND PERFORMED AN ALIGNMENT; HOWEVER, THE FAILURE PERSISTED. THE MANUFACTURER WAS

ISSUES:  1 - STEERING CONSTANTLY VIBRATES AT SPEEDS ABOVE 45MPH. SMOOTH ROADS HIGHER VIBRATIONS. THIS VIBRATION INCREASES TO EXTENT THAT YOU FEEL THAT YOU ARE LOOSING CONTROL OF THE CAR AT SPEED ABOVE 70MPH AND YOU CAN SEE THE STEERING VIBRATING. SO EFFECTIVELY, YOU CANT DRIVE YO

LEASED BRAND NEW PILOT LX ON MARCH 15, 2014. IT APPEARED TO BE IN PERFECT WORKING CONDITION. THEN, SUDDENLY ON 3/30/14 WHILE DRIVING HOME, IT LOST ABOUT 80 PERCENT OF ITS BRAKES. TO STOP IT, YOU MUST HAVE FOOT TO FLOOR ON BRAKES. IF THIS HAD BEEN AN EMERGENCY STOP, THERE COULD HA

RANDOMLY, WHILE DRIVING THE FASTEN SEATBELT ICON ILLUMINATES. ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE CAR WERE RESTRAINED AND NO OBJECTS WERE PLACED ON THE SEATS. THE RIGHT FRONT PASSENGER AIRBAG "OFF" INDICATOR LIGHT ALSO ACTIVATED. WHEN THE CAR WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER AND THE PROBLEM COULD NOT BE

narrative.headline: What 2014 Honda Pilot owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 115 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (27% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
